use_cases: Displaying key performance metrics in a dashboard
Showing progress indicators for goals or completion rates
Presenting statistical data with labels and values
Creating metric cards for analytics interfaces
Building KPI summary sections for business applications
ai_summary: A minimalist stats card component for displaying metrics and progress indicators. Features a clean card layout with header, title, description, and progress visualization using Radix UI primitives. Designed for dashboard and analytics interfaces with responsive container query support.
